avatar.container: width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 0; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: none; border: 2px solid #E8751A;
avatar.image: object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.3s ease; filter: contrast(1.2);

header.userName: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; color: #E8751A; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase;

footer.container: position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 14px; padding: 16px; color: #0A6E6E; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; border-top: 2px solid #E8751A; background: rgba(18,18,18,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase;
footer.text: color: inherit; transition: color 0.2s ease; white-space: nowrap;

h2.base: margin: 0; font-size: 1.6em; letter-spacing: 0.02em; line-height: 1.3; text-transform: uppercase;

emphasis.em: font-style: normal; color: #0A6E6E; background: rgba(10,110,110,0.15); padding: 0 4px; font-weight: 600;

list.taskList: list-style: none; margin-left: -22px; font-size: 15px; color: #C0C0C0; line-height: 1.8;

code.block: background: #1E1E1E; padding: 1.2em; border-radius: 0; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; line-height: 1.6; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; color: #E8751A; margin: 1.3em 0; border: 1px solid #333333;
code.inline: background: #1E1E1E; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 0; color: #0A6E6E; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; border: 1px solid #333333;

styles.quote: border-left: 4px solid #E8751A; padding: 0 0 0 18px; margin: 1.2em 0; color: #C0C0C0; font-style: normal; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.8; background: rgba(232,117,26,0.05);
styles.image: max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 1.3em auto; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(232,117,26,0.15); filter: contrast(1.1);
styles.link: color: #0A6E6E; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 2px solid #0A6E6E; transition: all 0.2s ease; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em;

table.container: width: 100%; margin: 1.3em 0; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; overflow: hidden; border: 2px solid #333333;
table.header: background: #1E1E1E; font-weight: 700; color: #E8751A; padding: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em; border-bottom: 2px solid #E8751A;

footnote.ref: color: #0A6E6E; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9em; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em;
footnote.backref: color: #0A6E6E; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9em; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em;
